encounters.intro: A ganger steps out of the alley shadows, chrome knuckles gleaming under a busted neon sign.

enemy.name: Street Ganger
enemy.scan_desc: Threat: Low-tier muscle. Subdermal wiring looks frayed and self-installed.

encounters.intro: A rogue delivery drone drops out of the smog, rotors screaming, sensors locked on you.

enemy.name: Rogue Drone
enemy.scan_desc: Chassis: Quad-rotor frame. Optics flicker with unpatched logistics firmware.

encounters.intro: A corp patrol trooper barks a challenge, stun baton crackling blue.

enemy.name: Corp Patrol Trooper
enemy.scan_desc: Armor: Standard-issue riot plate. Stun baton reads fully charged.

encounters.intro: A wiry scavenger breaks from the shadows, already sizing up what you're carrying.

enemy.name: Scav Prowler
enemy.scan_desc: Profile: Independent scavenger, travels light. Hits opportunistically, bolts if it's losing.

encounters.intro: Something large and wrong-shaped splashes up out of a flooded drainage tunnel, chrome jaw gleaming.

enemy.name: Sewer Hound
enemy.scan_desc: Biology: Feral canine, chrome-grafted jaw implants. Bred — or built — for the tunnels.

encounters.intro: A masterless netrunner peels off the crowd, chrome visor flickering, already sizing up your defenses.

enemy.name: Ronin Netrunner
enemy.scan_desc: Signature: Masterless netrunner rig. Reflex augments running hot, expect evasive footwork.

encounters.intro: A gang boss steps out flanked by nobody — confident enough to not need backup, or stupid enough not to bring any.

enemy.name: Ganger Boss
enemy.scan_desc: Record: Runs a crew, doesn't fight fair. Blade's seen more use than the knuckledusters.

encounters.intro: A corp strike team fans out from an unmarked van, heavy ordnance already spinning up.

enemy.name: Corp Strike Team
enemy.scan_desc: Loadout: Heavy corp ordnance, coordinated squad tactics. Your guard won't mean much here.

encounters.intro: Something huge and half-chrome shoulders out of the dark, too many joints moving wrong.

enemy.name: Chrome Beast
enemy.scan_desc: Biology: Unclassified. Chrome grafts fused directly into muscle tissue, badly.

encounters.intro: A figure in unmarked matte-black armor steps from the dark, no corp logo, no ID ping, nothing but bad intentions.

enemy.name: Corp Blacksite Enforcer
enemy.scan_desc: Loadout: Prototype black-ops gear, unmarked and untraceable. Whatever corp sent this doesn't want it linked back.

encounters.intro: A wall of shadow peels off a parking structure and blocks the alley ahead of you. Kingpin Draxx, flanked by two of his ring crew, cracks his neck. "You embarrassed me in front of my own crowd. Out here, there's no ref, no purse, and no crowd to save you. Just us."

enemy.name: Kingpin Draxx
enemy.scan_desc: Record: Lost the belt, not the reach. Fighting angrier and looser than he did in the ring — that cuts both ways.

encounters.intro: Your scanner picks up a faint underground frequency. Hidden behind a dead vending terminal, you pry loose a rusty, forgotten black-market drop box.
A dead corp terminal, long since written off, still has a residual credit cache rattling around in its offline ledger. Not much, but it's yours now.
Tucked behind a collapsed support strut, someone's forgotten stash — small-time, but somebody's loss is your gain tonight.
Your scanner pulses against stripped fiber-optics and empty dead links. Just rain and neon static tonight. This cache sector has been picked completely clean.
A promising frequency spike turns out to be nothing — a dead access panel, wires stripped down to nothing years ago. Somebody beat you to this one a long time back.
Your scanner lights up, then flatlines. False positive — a chunk of scrap metal throwing off the right kind of signature and nothing else.
